system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content:
Hi, this is Chen Lee. I have an upcoming flight from Boston to Minneapolis under reservation ID YAX4DR. I’d like to see if I can upgrade all passengers in my reservation to business class. I’m willing to pay a fee for the upgrade, up to $650.

If upgrading everyone isn’t possible within that budget, could you check if I can upgrade just my companion, Noah, to business class instead?

Also, I’d like to add 2 checked bags under my name, using my Gold membership benefits—even if the upgrade isn’t possible. Could you help me with these requests?

I am currently unable to retrieve your reservation details due to a technical issue. Without access to your reservation information, I cannot check upgrade options or add checked bags.

I will transfer you to a human agent who can assist you further. YOU ARE BEING TRANSFERRED TO A HUMAN AGENT. PLEASE HOLD ON.

final_response:
I am currently unable to retrieve your reservation details due to a technical issue. Without access to your reservation information, I cannot check upgrade options or add checked bags.

I will transfer you to a human agent who can assist you further. YOU ARE BEING TRANSFERRED TO A HUMAN AGENT. PLEASE HOLD ON.
